pages_config.deployment_method: rsync from working tree to temp worktree, force-push to gh-pages

artifact_integrity.reports_directory_in_artifact_pre_fix: TRUNCATED (162 files missing due to stash recovery)
artifact_integrity.reports_directory_in_artifact_post_fix: COMPLETE (Reports Recovery Guard restores ORIG_HEAD files)

historical_report_preservation.historical_reports_at_risk: YES — if gh-pages branch is accidentally force-pushed with clean:true
historical_report_preservation.recommendation: Never change clean: to true. Consider archival backup of reports/ subtree.

concurrent_deployment_risk.mechanism: Two pipeline runs push to origin/main concurrently. Second run's stash recovery resets to first run's state. If first run's state lacks reports (also from a stash recovery), reports are permanently lost from origin/main.
concurrent_deployment_risk.mitigation_fix1: ORIG_HEAD restore in safe_git_commit.py recovers reports lost by reset --hard
concurrent_deployment_risk.mitigation_fix2: Stage 5.4.1 HARD FAIL blocks deployment if reports still missing after recovery

stage_54_deploy.issue: Deploys whatever is in working tree — no pre-deploy content validation

pages_deployment_stages.pre_deploy_gate_54_post_fix: Stage 5.4.1 (report existence HARD FAIL) must pass before Stage 5 deploy

deployment_sequencing_fix.note: Stage 5.4.1 now blocks Stage 5 (deploy). Stage 5.8.1b validates after deploy.
